description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that uses the default runner image, runs the commands: mkdir -p public/.well-known/acme-challenge/, cp -R acme-challenge public/.well-known/, cp *.html public/, cp robots.txt public/robots.txt, cp favicon.ico public/favicon.ico, cp -r images/* public/images/, cp -r css public/css, gzip -k -6 -r public; publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact; and only runs on the master branch.
